gist.headline: New sprout in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app joins the Pollinations ecosystem! We've just added scene.riko to our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Added the community-built app scene.riko to the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore scene.riko directly from the Pollinations community directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about adding a new app to the 'Greenhouse' (community showcase). The visual should feature Polly the bee in a literal greenhouse, watering a new digital plant or looking at a new glowing sprout representing the new app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing new code-plant in a lush digital greenhouse. A small wooden sign next to the plant reads 'scene.riko' in pixel font. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
